title: Information and Documents Related to 8/19/20 Suicide Attempt at Wyatt Detention Facility

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Rhode Island Access to Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

In response to a February 2026 APRA request titled “Suicide attempts, self-harm incidents and deaths,” on March 20, 2026 the Central Falls Detention Facility Corporation released a one-page document with information about eight suicide attempts that took take place at the Wyatt between 2019 and the present.

One entry on that document, dated “8/19/2020,” reads:

“Attempted Suicide - detainee jumped off the top tier coming down head long onto the floor, he was taken to RI Hospital.”

I am requesting any and all available information and documents related to this incident.

This includes:

-Transcript and recording (if available) of any 911 calls made to CFPD about the incident
-Any CFPD police reports about the incident
-Any emails among between Wyatt or CFDFC and CFPD about the incident
-Any records or reports from CF first responders about the incident

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Philip Eil

title: Information and Documents Related to 4/22/25 Suicide Attempt at Wyatt Detention Facility

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Rhode Island Access to Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

In response to a February 2026 APRA request titled “Suicide attempts, self-harm incidents and deaths,” on March 20, 2026 the Central Falls Detention Facility Corporation released a one-page document with information about eight suicide attempts that took take place at the Wyatt between 2019 and the present.

One entry on that document, dated “4/22/2025,” reads, in part:

“Hospital Detail/Constant Observation Watch - Dt. was observed hanging himself from the rear window in cell F-2. He made a noose from the sheets and secured it from the bar in the window. He was removed from the cell and secured on the dayroom floor. He was evaluated by medial and transported via rescue to the hospital for evaluation.”

I am requesting any and all available information and documents related to this incident.

This includes:

-Transcript and recording (if available) of any 911 calls made to CFPD about the incident
-Any CFPD police reports about the incident
-Any emails among between Wyatt or CFDFC and CFPD about the incident
-Any records or reports from CF first responders about the incident

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Philip Eil
